name: ALCopsDetectTfmFromBCArtifact
friendlyName: ALCops Detect TFM from BC Artifact
description: [Deprecated] Use ALCopsDownloadAnalyzers@1 with detectUsing instead. Detect the target framework moniker from a Business Central artifact URL by reading its manifest
author: ALCops
instanceNameFormat: ALCops Detect TFM from BC Artifact

outputVariables.name: tfm
outputVariables.description: The detected target framework moniker (e.g., net8.0, netstandard2.1)

outputVariables.name: dotNetVersion
outputVariables.description: The .NET version string from the artifact manifest (e.g., 8.0.24)
